series_metadata.series_description: Record series includes coupons representing a payment voucher sent by the Department for business tax payments, including Financial Institution Tax, Petroleum Activity Tax, 911, Resort, Sales/Use, Commercial Activity Tax, and Corporate Franchise Tax. Series includes payment coupons for assessments for all taxes as well.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 6 mos. after scanned & imaged, then shred. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
